title: Adda247 Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adda247 Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
